# NavPal Installed Skills

These skills were curated and installed for this workspace (GitHub Copilot project-level path: `.github/skills/`).

## Installed Skill Set

- `brainstorming`
- `systematic-debugging`
- `test-driven-development`
- `webapp-testing`
- `composition-patterns`
- `react-best-practices`
- `web-design-guidelines`
- `ui-ux-pro-max`
- `lint-and-validate`
- `security-auditor`

## Why this set

NavPal is a full-stack TypeScript project with:

- Next.js frontend (`frontend/`)
- Node/Express backend (`backend/`)
- map/navigation UX flows

This set emphasizes practical day-to-day needs:

- planning and decomposition
- systematic debugging
- test-first implementation
- browser/UI validation
- React/Next.js performance and composition patterns
- UI/UX quality and accessibility review

## Source Repositories Reviewed

- https://github.com/sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills
- https://github.com/guanyang/antigravity-skills
- https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-agent-skills

## Installed From

- Source used for file installation: `guanyang/antigravity-skills`
- Source path: `skills/<skill-name>/...`

Additional source used:

- `sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills`
- source paths: `skills/lint-and-validate`, `skills/security-auditor`

> Note: some skills include scripts/resources in addition to `SKILL.md`; these were copied along with each skill directory.
